situational_context: Running comeback week 8 (12th run due Sunday): Run #12 on June 21 was a critical distance overreach (7.5 km vs 4 km planned, suffer 36) — mirrors the March 2025 failure pattern of erratic distance jumps at week 8-10. Run #13 cancelled June 24 (41C heatwave), rescheduled to June 28 at Chantilly forest. HRV persistently UNBALANCED/LOW (6/7 days), weekly avg 34 ms — multi-week decline from 39-40 (mid-May) suggesting accumulated fatigue from running + e-bike + heatwave stress. ACWR normalized to 1.21 (down from 1.35 on June 14) after 3 rest days. Body battery recovering (49 vs 28 post-overreach). Weight reversed +1 kg to 103.7 kg on high-calorie days. Protein consistently below 150g target (avg 119g). At Hotel Mercure Chantilly (June 26-29) — forest offers shaded, soft-surface training. Heatwave easing from 41C peak toward 35C Sunday. E-bike commuting primary weekly volume. Vitamin D retest due July 2026.

plan_7d_ahead.type: Sortie velo 60 min gravel/ebike Z1-Z2 (Foret de Chantilly)
Run #13 - 4 km Z2 strict (Foret de Chantilly)

recommendations.text: DISTANCE CAP on Run #13 Sunday: STRICT 4 km maximum. Run #12 (7.5 km vs 4 km planned) repeated the exact overreach pattern that ended the March 2025 comeback at week 8-10. Set Garmin distance alert at 4.0 km. Walk back if distance reached.

HRV recovery priority: weekly avg at 34 ms with 6/7 days UNBALANCED/LOW — multi-week decline from 39-40 ms. Hold ALL sessions Z1-Z2, target sleep >= 7.5h, hydrate aggressively through heatwave (>= 3L/day + electrolytes). No intensity until weekly avg returns >= 37 ms.
recommendations.measurable: HRV weekly avg >= 37 ms within 10 days; zero UNBALANCED/LOW days for 3+ consecutive

recommendations.text: Protein intake to >= 150g/day — averaging 119g/day. At 103.7 kg during running comeback, insufficient protein impairs tendon collagen synthesis and slows body recomposition. Target >= 30g protein per meal, 4-5 meals/day.
recommendations.measurable: Daily protein >= 140g for 5+ of next 7 days

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any run exceeding planned distance by >25% triggers immediate next-run pause
